message:
feat(interactive,auth): migrate clipboard to arboard and add Copilot/GitLab OAuth providers

Replace the deprecated `clipboard` crate with `arboard` for cross-platform
clipboard access, eliminating transitive dependencies on legacy objc/x11
bindings (block, malloc_buf, objc, objc-foundation, clipboard-win 2.x).
This is a drop-in API migration: ClipboardProvider→Clipboard::new(),
set_contents()→set_text().

Expand OAuth support with two new provider integrations:

- GitHub Copilot: Full device flow (RFC 8628) support — the user enters a
  user_code at the verification URL, then Pi polls for the access token.
  Adds DeviceFlow variant to PendingLoginKind and device_code storage in
  PendingOAuth state.

- GitLab / GitLab Duo: Browser-based PKCE OAuth flow using configurable
  GITLAB_CLIENT_ID and GITLAB_BASE_URL environment variables, defaulting
  to https://gitlab.com.

Both flows integrate into the existing login command dispatch and share
the credential persistence path (auth.json).

Default features updated to enable clipboard, wasm-host, and
sqlite-sessions out of the box for better first-run experience.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
